name: sauce-demo-playwright-framework
description: Professional beginner-friendly Playwright TypeScript automation framework for Sauce Demo.

dependencyPurpose.@faker-js/faker: Generates realistic dynamic test data such as names, emails, passwords, and postal codes.
dependencyPurpose.@playwright/test: Provides the Playwright test runner, browser automation APIs, assertions, fixtures, and reporting hooks.
dependencyPurpose.@types/node: Adds TypeScript types for Node.js globals used in config files, such as process.env and path handling.
dependencyPurpose.allure-commandline: Generates and opens the final Allure HTML report from the raw allure-results output.
dependencyPurpose.allure-playwright: Connects Playwright test execution to Allure so steps, failures, screenshots, and attachments appear in Allure reports.
dependencyPurpose.dotenv: Loads environment variables from dev.env, qa.env, and prod.env files into process.env.
dependencyPurpose.typescript: Adds static typing so framework code is easier to maintain and safer to refactor.
